prompt:
Polished black-and-white vertical Korean webtoon/manga for a Tistory blog article, 4 stacked panels, mobile-readable. Theme: 2026 대한민국 숙박세일페스타, coupon starts June 11 at 10 AM, get coupon before booking and check conditions. Same friendly Korean guide woman with round glasses and a traveler with phone. Large clean speech balloons integrated into composition, no extra text, no brand logos.
Panel 1: traveler about to reserve lodging on phone, confused. Speech balloon from traveler, tail to traveler mouth: "예약 먼저 할까?"
Panel 2: guide points to clock showing 10:00 and coupon ticket. Speech balloon from guide, tail to guide mouth: "6월 11일 10시, 쿠폰 먼저!"
Panel 3: phone screen shows map outside 수도권 and checklist icons. Speech balloon from guide, tail to guide mouth: "지역·금액·연박 조건을 같이 봐요"
Panel 4: traveler checks payment screen happily with discount applied. Speech balloon from traveler, tail to traveler mouth: "결제 전 적용금액까지 확인!"
Use natural readable Korean Gothic-like lettering, thick ink panel borders, clear faces, high contrast, no garbled pseudo-text.
